basic_details.job_title: CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) Medical Officer MBBS Notification 2026 has been released on 12 July 2026 on the official website of CSMC. A total of 10 Medical Officer MBBS vacancies have been announced through the CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSMC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSMC Medical Officer MBBS Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer MBBS post at CSMC is scheduled for 24 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer MBBS position?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Medical Officer MBBS position is an MBBS degree. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Medical Officer MBBS post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer MBBS post is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer MBBS post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer MBBS post by the CSMC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Medical Officer MBBS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500, and for SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 250. This fee is applicable for the walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer MBBS post involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer MBBS position is a contractual job. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis with the CSMC.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before attending the interview.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates (if applicable) are required.
